description: In-game overlay: YOUR TEAM (left) + ENEMY TEAM (right), 6 portrait rows each. Coordinates are in the 1024x565 reference space and tuned so each box tightly captures the character face portrait (ignoring rank badges, class shields, and names). Left column portraits: x=170..225 (w=55). Right column portraits: x=525..580 (w=55). Row tops start at y=162 with ~38px pitch. Keep the reference_image at 1024x565 so these boxes project correctly to higher-resolution captures.
